produce.label: Produce
produce.summary: Captures raw expert conversations before they degrade into messy source files.
produce.whatEnters: Expert sessions, recordings, audio signals, camera feeds, overlays, and production notes.
produce.whatHappens: The machine stabilizes the source material with recording standards, scene controls, audio checks, and backup capture.
produce.whatComesOut: Clean source media for packaging, publishing, measurement, and preservation.

package.label: Package
package.summary: Turns one source session into audience-ready media assets.
package.whatEnters: Clean source recordings, transcripts, key moments, guest context, and topic notes.
package.whatHappens: The machine cuts, labels, titles, describes, formats, and polishes the raw session into channel-ready pieces.
package.whatComesOut: Titles, descriptions, clips, reels, thumbnails, chapters, quote cards, and guest assets.

publish.label: Publish
publish.summary: Sends packaged assets into channels while the owned website stays the canonical home.
publish.whatEnters: Finished content assets, release copy, channel variants, links, and publishing checklists.
publish.whatHappens: The machine routes each asset to the right destination and keeps the durable version anchored in owned space.
publish.whatComesOut: Website pages, RSS items, YouTube videos, LinkedIn posts, emails, premieres, and simulcast replays.

prove.label: Prove
prove.summary: Measures what shipped and turns performance into factory feedback.
prove.whatEnters: Published assets, analytics, engagement signals, conversions, benchmarks, and evidence notes.
prove.whatHappens: The machine scores usefulness, repeatability, evidence level, and production fit.
prove.whatComesOut: Scorecards, evidence labels, benchmark checks, pattern improvements, and feedback signals.

preserve.label: Preserve
preserve.summary: Stores knowledge so every session can feed the next one.
preserve.whatEnters: Transcripts, speaker labels, timestamps, metadata, tags, assets, and topic relationships.
preserve.whatHappens: The machine indexes, tags, connects, and retrieves knowledge across the archive.
preserve.whatComesOut: Searchable memory, reusable insights, vector retrieval, content libraries, and compounding knowledge.
